{{Short description|National association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Macau women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=August 2022}}
{{Infobox national football team
| Name                  = Macau
| Badge                 = Flag of Macau.svg
| Nickname              = {{nowrap|{{lang|pt|Seleção do Lótus}} (The Lotus' Team)}}<br>{{nowrap|{{lang|pt|Verdes}} (The Greens)}}
| Association           = [[Macau Football Association|Associação de Futebol de Macau]] (AFM)
| Confederation         = [[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]] (Asia)
| Sub-confederation     = [[East Asian Football Federation|EAFF]] (East Asia)
| Coach                 = [[Emmanuel Noruega]] (caretaker)
| Captain               = [[Chan Man]]
| Most caps             = [[Cheang Cheng Ieong]] (58)
| Top scorer            = [[Chan Kin Seng]] (17)<ref name="rsssf@webarchive" />
| Home Stadium          = [[Estádio Campo Desportivo]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = MAC
| FIFA Rank             = {{FIFA World Rankings|MAC}}
| FIFA max              = 156
| FIFA max date         = September 1997
| FIFA min              = 204
| FIFA min date         = July 2014
| Elo Rank              = {{nowrap|{{World Football Elo Ratings|Macau}}}}
| Elo max               = 182
| Elo max date          = 13 February 2000
| Elo min               = 229
| Elo min date          = March 2015
| pattern_la1 = _adidastirocm24g
| pattern_b1 = _adidastirocm24g
| pattern_ra1 = _adidastirocm24g
| pattern_sh1 = _adidastirocm24g
| pattern_so1 = 
| leftarm1 = 007711
| body1 = 007711
| rightarm1 = 007711
| shorts1 = 007711
| socks1 = 007711
| pattern_la2 = _adidastirocm24w
| pattern_b2 = _adidastirocm24w
| pattern_ra2 = _adidastirocm24w
| pattern_sh2 = _adidastirocm24w
| pattern_so2 = 
| leftarm2 = FFFFFF
| body2 = FFFFFF
| rightarm2 = FFFFFF
| shorts2 = FFFFFF
| socks2 = FFFFFF
| First game            = {{nowrap|{{fb|MAC|colonial}} 4–2 {{fb-rt|HKG|1910}}}}<br>([[Macau]]; 29 March 1948)<ref name="elorating@webarchive" />
| Largest win           = {{nowrap|{{fb|MAC}} 6–1 {{fb-rt|NMI}}}}<br>([[Yona, Guam]]; 11 March 2009)
| Largest loss          = {{nowrap|{{fb|MAC|municipal}} 0–10 {{fb-rt|JPN|1870}}}}<br>([[Muscat, Oman]]; 25 March 1997)<br>{{fb|JPN|1870}} 10–0 {{fb-rt|MAC|municipal}}<br>([[Tokyo, Japan]]; 22 June 1997)
| Regional name         = [[AFC Solidarity Cup]]
| Regional cup apps     = 1
| Regional cup first    = [[2016 AFC Solidarity Cup|2016]]
| Regional cup best     = Runners-up ([[2016 AFC Solidarity Cup|2016]])
| 2ndRegional name      = [[AFC Challenge Cup]]
| 2ndRegional cup apps  = 1
| 2ndRegional cup first = [[2006 AFC Challenge Cup|2006]]
| 2ndRegional cup best  = Group stage ([[2006 AFC Challenge Cup|2006]])
}}
{{Infobox Chinese
| showflag = stp
| t = 澳門足球代表隊
| i = |
| j = Ou3 mun2 zuk1 kau4 doi6 biu2 deoi2
| ci = ōumǔːn.tsʊ́k̚kʰɐ̏u.tɔ̀ːipǐːutɵ̌y
}}

The '''Macau national football team''' ({{zh|t=澳門足球代表隊}}; {{langx|pt|Seleção Macaense de Futebol}}) represents the [[Special administrative region of the People's Republic of China|Chinese special administrative region]] of [[Macau]] in international association football. The team is supervised by the [[Macau Football Association]] ({{zh|t=澳門足球總會}}; Portuguese: ''Associação de Futebol de Macau''). The Macau football team has a [[FIFA World Rankings|ranking]] that is one of the lowest among the [[FIFA]] members.

The national team has never qualified for the [[AFC Asian Cup]] or [[EAFF East Asian Championship]]. The team qualified for the [[2006 AFC Challenge Cup]], where they got one draw and two losses.

The team had been representing [[Macau]] in international football events before 1999 when Macau was a [[Subdivisions of Portugal#Overseas Provinces|dependent territory]] of [[Portugal]]. It continues to represent Macau even after Macau was [[Handover of Macau|handed over]] to the People's Republic of China by Portugal and became a [[special administrative region (People's Republic of China)|special administrative region]] of China in 1999. This team is separate from the [[China national football team]], as the [[Macau Basic Law|Basic Law]] and the principle of "[[one country, two systems]]" allows Macau to maintain its own representative teams in international sports competitions. In Macau, the Macau football team is colloquially referred to as the "Macau team" ({{lang-zh|c=澳門隊|labels=no}}), while the [[China national football team|Chinese national team]] is referred to as the "national team" ({{lang-zh|c=國家隊|labels=no}}).

== History ==
Macau participated in the inaugural [[2006 AFC Challenge Cup]] held in [[Bangladesh]] being grouped with [[Kyrgyzstan national football team|Kyrgyzstan]], [[Tajikistan national football team|Tajikistan]] and [[Pakistan national football team|Pakistan]] but lost all of their match against their opponent.

Macau then participated in the inaugural [[2016 AFC Solidarity Cup]] held in [[Kuching]], [[Malaysia]] being grouped with [[Laos national football team|Laos]], [[Mongolia national football team|Mongolia]] and [[Sri Lanka national football team|Sri Lanka]]. In the first match, Macau won Mongolia 2–1 with captain, [[Niki Torrão]] scoring a brace. The following match, Macau won Laos 4–1 before eventually drawing to Sri Lanka 1–1 which see Macau advanced to the semi-finals as group leaders. Macau faced [[Brunei national football team|Brunei]] which [[Leong Ka Hang]] rescued Macau from a one goal deficit to level the match at 1–1 seeing both sides off to extra time however the match goes on to penalties shoot out with Macau advancing to their first even international cup final. On 15 November 2016, Macau faced [[Nepal national football team|Nepal]] however in the 29' minute of the match, Nepalese [[Sujal Shrestha]] break the deadlock and Nepal ended up winning the 2016 AFC Solidarity Cup at the [[Sarawak Stadium]]. Leong Ka Hang is given the tournament 'Most Valuable Player' and Niki Torrão as the top joint goal scorer with 4 goals.

During the [[2022 FIFA World Cup qualification – AFC first round|2022 FIFA World Cup qualification]] against [[Sri Lanka national football team|Sri Lanka]] in which they won the first tie 1–0, they forfeited the second tie which awarded Sri Lanka was awarded as a 3–0 victory to Sri Lanka after Macau did not send their team for the match due to safety reasons following the [[2019 Sri Lanka Easter bombings]]. After a 4 years hiatus from the [[COVID-19 pandemic]], On 26 March 2023, Macau play their first ever international matches at their own ground, [[Estádio Campo Desportivo]] against [[Singapore national football team|Singapore]] in a 1–0 defeat. On 19 June 2023, Macau travelled to [[Dalian]], [[China]] to face [[Myanmar national football team|Myanmar]] in a friendly match. Since their returned to international football, Macau mostly played against Southeast Asian country like [[Cambodia national football team|Cambodia]] and [[Brunei national football team|Brunei]].
[[File:Brunei-Macau 6 September 2024 11.jpg|thumb|324x324px|Macau starting line-up during the [[2027 AFC Asian Cup qualification – play-off round|2027 AFC Asian Cup qualification play off round]] against [[Brunei national football team|Brunei]].]]

In August 2024, all non-Chinese nationals listed to play for the Macau Football Association became ineligible for the team under FIFA Congress's adoption to a rule amendment made in 18 September 2020. The players affected include [[Vítor Almeida (footballer)|Vitor Almeida]], Iuri Capelo, captain [[Nicholas Torrão]], and [[Filipe Duarte (footballer)|Filipe Duarte]], as well as a fifth player who was about to join up.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://macaudailytimes.com.mo/nationality-rule-in-question-following-exclusion-of-non-chinese-from-macau-football-team-fifa.html|title='Nationality rule' in question following exclusion of non-Chinese from Macau football team: FIFA|first=Renato|last=Marques|date=30 Aug 2024|access-date=22 Nov 2024|newspaper=[[Macau Daily Times]]}}</ref>

In September 2024, Macau signed a deal with [[Adidas]] in preparation for the [[2027 AFC Asian Cup qualification – play-off round]] ending their 10-years partnership with [[Nike, Inc.|Nike]]. It will also see the team back in Adidas since 2004 making their debut against [[Brunei national football team|Brunei]].

==Rivalries==
===Hong Kong===
{{See also|Hong Kong–Macau Interport}}

The [[Hong Kong–Macau Interport|Hong Kong–Macau rivalry]] has been contested by [[Hong Kong Football Association]] and Macau Football Association since 1937.

==FIFA suspension==
In 2005, Macau was temporarily barred by [[FIFA]] from entering any international matches because of alleged undue influence of the government in forming the committee of its football association. The suspension was lifted after rectification by Macau.<ref name="espn@webarchive" /><ref name="fifa@webarchive" />

== Results and fixtures ==
{{main|Macau national football team results}}
 
{{Accessibility dispute|section|date=September 2024|reason=[[screen reader]]s can not read content that is collapsed and hidden}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.<ref name="worldfootballnet" />

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{footballbox collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[Exhibition game|Friendly]]
| date       = 5 June
| time       = 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|MAC}}
| score      = 0–2
| report     = https://jtm.com.mo/local/macau-perde-empata-em-estagio-em-taiwan/
| team2      = {{fb|TPE}}
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = 
| location   = [[Taipei]], Taiwan
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| result     = L
}}

{{footballbox collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[Exhibition game|Friendly]]
| date       = 7 June
| time       = {{UTZ|19:15|8}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|MAC}}
| score      = 2–2
| report     = https://jtm.com.mo/local/macau-perde-empata-em-estagio-em-taiwan/
| team2      = {{fbaicon|TPE}} [[Taichung Futuro F.C.|Taichung Futuro]]
| goals1     = 
*[[Lei Ka Him]] {{goal|?}}
*[[Leung Chi Seng]] {{goal|?}}
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = Xitun Football Field
| location   = [[Taichung]], Taiwan
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| result     = D
}}

===2026===

{{football box collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[Exhibition game|Friendly]]
| date       = 7 February
| time       = 
| team1      = Guangdong XI {{fbaicon|CHN}}
| score      = 2–0
| team2      = {{fb|MAC}}
| report     = https://info.newsgd.com/node_28ab3f3552/cab6b01ce5.shtml
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
| location   = [[Zhongshan]], China
| stadium    = [[Zhongshan Sports Center Stadium]]
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| result     = L
}}

{{football box collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[Exhibition game|Friendly]]
| date       = 10 February
| time       = 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|MAC}}
| score      = 3–2
| team2      = {{fbaicon|CHN}} Guangdong XI
| report     = https://macaonews.org/life/sports/macao-beat-guangdong-3-2-guangdong-macao-cup/
| goals1     = 
*[[Leung Chi Seng]] {{goal|3}}
*[[Lei Cheng Lam]] {{goal|67}}
*[[Leong Wai Hin]]  {{goal|89}}
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = [[Estádio Campo Desportivo]]
| location   = [[Taipa]], Macau
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| result     = W
}}
{{football box collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]]
| date       = 26 March
| time       = {{UTZ|13:30|2}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|ARU}}
| score      = 4–1
| team2      = {{fb|MAC}}
| report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-26/aruba-vs-macau/4103617
| goals1     = 
*[[Carlito Fermina|Fermina]] {{goal|5}}
*[[Jaybrien Romano|Romano]] {{goal|13||16}}
*[[Conner van Kilsdonk|Van Kilsdonk]] {{goal|66}}
| goals2     = 
*[[Leong Ka Hang]] {{goal|88}}
| location   = [[Kigali]], Rwanda
| stadium    = [[Kigali Pelé Stadium]]
| attendance = 
| referee    = [[Samuel Uwikunda]] ([[Rwanda Football Federation|Rwanda]])
| result     = L
}}

{{football box collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]]
| date       = 29 March
| time       = {{UTZ|15:00|2}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|MAC}}
| score      = 0–6
| team2      = {{fb|TAN}}
| report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/10017/292887/292888/400021872?date=2026-03-29
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
*[[Amâncio]] {{goal|16|o.g.}}
*[[Bakari Mwamnyeto|Mwamnyeto]] {{goal|26}}
*[[Mudathir Yahya|Yahya]] {{goal|45}}
*[[Paul Peter|Peter]] {{goal|56}}
*[[Novatus Miroshi|Miroshi]] {{goal|74}}
*[[Tarryn Allarakhia|Allarakhia]] {{goal|87}}
| location   = [[Kigali]], Rwanda
| stadium    = [[Kigali Pelé Stadium]]
| attendance = 12,900
| referee    = [[Lucky Kasalirwe]] ([[Federation of Uganda Football Associations|Uganda]])
| result     = L
}}

== Coaching staff ==

{| class = "wikitable" style = "text-align:center;"
|-
! style="color:#FFFFFF;background:#0F7562"|Position
! style="color:#FFFFFF;background:#0F7562"|Name
|-
| align = "left" | Team manager
| align = "left" | {{flagicon|MAC}} Zhang Liqun
|-
| align = "left" | Technical director
| align = "left" | {{flagicon|MAC}} [[Iong Cho Ieng]]
|-
| align = "left" | Head coach (acting)
| align = "left" | {{flagicon|MAC}} Emmanuel Noruega
|-
| align = "left" | Assistant coaches
| align = "left" | {{flagicon|POR}} Pedro Simões<br>{{flagicon|MAC}} Lai Yong<br>{{flagicon|MAC}} Luo Wei Xing<br>{{flagicon|MAC}} Cai Cheng Zhang <br><!--{{flagicon|MAC}} Raimundo Ng<ref name="2023myanmarfull" /><ref name="2023worldcupfull@facebook" /><br>{{flagicon|MAC}} Francisco Lai<ref name="2023myanmarfull" /><ref name="2023worldcupfull@facebook" /><br>{{flagicon|MAC}} Filipe Chiang<ref name="2023myanmarfull" />--><br>{{flagicon|MAC}} Lok Chong Keong<ref name="2023myanmarfull" /><ref name="2023worldcupfull@facebook" /><ref name="2024futuro@facebook" /><br>
|-
| align = "left" | Team doctor
| align = "left" | {{flagicon|MAC}} Liu Zhiliang
--->
|}

===Coaching history===
{{div col|colwidth=22em}}
*{{flagicon|Portugal}} [[João dos Santos (manager)|João dos Santos]] (1996–1998)
*{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Eiji Ueda]] (2000–2002)
*{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Masataka Imai]] (2003–2004)
*{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Masanaga Kageyama]] (2006–2008)
*{{flagicon|Hong Kong}} [[Leung Sui Wing]] (2008–2015)
*{{flagicon|Macau}} [[Tam Iao San]] (2015–2017)
*{{flagicon|Hong Kong}} [[Chan Hiu Ming]] (2017–2018)
*{{flagicon|Macau}} [[Iong Cho Ieng]] (2018–2019)
*{{flagicon|Angola}} [[Lázaro Oliveira]] (2020–2024)
*{{flagicon|Hong Kong}} [[Kwok Kar Lok]] (2024–2025)
{{div col end}}
{{Macau national football team managers|state=expanded}}

== Players ==

=== Current squad ===
The following players are selected for the match against [[Hong Kong national football team|Hong Kong]] on 19 March 2025.

''Caps and goals correct as of 12 December 2024, after the match against [[Guam national football team|Guam]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=1|pos=GK|name=[[Ho Man Fai]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1993|4|24}}|caps=45|goals=0|club=[[Free agent]]|clubnat=}}
{{nat fs g player|no=20|pos=GK|name=[[Fong Chi Hang]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1989|10|26}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Cheng Fung]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=22|pos=GK|name=[[Lei Wa Si]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2000|8|21}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Shao Jiang]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=2|pos=DF|name=[[Marcos Cheong]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2002|8|25}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[S.L. Benfica de Macau|Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau}}<ref name="2024futuromatch@facebook"/>
{{nat fs g player|no=3|pos=DF|name=[[Amâncio]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1990|3|29}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[S.L. Benfica de Macau|Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=4|pos=DF|name=[[Kam Chi Hou]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1995|4|4}}|caps=17|goals=0|club=[[S.L. Benfica de Macau|Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=5|pos=DF|name=[[Xiao Rongrui]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2002|02|25}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[University of Macau|Universidade de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=7|pos=DF|name=[[Chan Man]]|other=[[Captain (association football)|Captain]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1993|10|4}}|caps=32|goals=2|club=[[S.L. Benfica de Macau|Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=13|pos=DF|name=[[Sou Hin Nang]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2005|05|24}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[University of Macau|Universidade de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=16|pos=DF|name=[[Lam Weng Kin]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|07|17}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=Shao Jiang|clubnat=Macau}}

{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=8|pos=MF|name=[[Ng Wa Keng]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1999|8|2}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[S.L. Benfica de Macau|Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=9|pos=MF|name=[[Si Hou In]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2004|10|21}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Cheng Fung]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=10|pos=MF|name=[[Dion Carlos Choi]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1999|2|6}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Chao Pak Kei]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=11|pos=MF|name=[[Ieong Lek Hang]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2003|11|11}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[University of Macau|Universidade de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=15|pos=MF|name=[[Cheong Hoi San]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1998|06|26}}|caps=15|goals=0|club=Shao Jiang|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=18|pos=MF|name=[[Nuno Pereira (footballer)|Nuno Jerónimo]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1997|11|2}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Chao Pak Kei]]|clubnat=Macau}}

{{nat fs g player|no=23|pos=MF|name=[[Ho Chi Fong]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1994|09|30}}|caps=15|goals=0|club=[[Chao Pak Kei]]|clubnat=Macau}}

{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=12|pos=FW|name=[[Gu Hoi Sou]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2005|1|5}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Chao Pak Kei]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=14|pos=FW|name=[[Leung Chi Seng]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2000|6|3}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Chao Pak Kei]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=17|pos=FW|name=[[Lei Cheng Lam]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2005|1|24}}|caps=5|goals=1|club=[[University of Macau|Universidade de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=19|pos=FW|name=[[Ng Lai Teng]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2004|11|6}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Cheng Fung]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g player|no=21|pos=FW|name=[[Pang Chi Hang]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1993|11|3}}|caps=34|goals=1|club=[[Chao Pak Kei]]|clubnat=Macau}}
{{nat fs g end}}

=== Recent call-ups ===
The following players have also been called up to the Macau squad within the previous 12 months.

{{nat fs r start}}

{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=Lo Weng Hou|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1996|1|31}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[S.L. Benfica de Macau|Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=Lam Chak Fong|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2007|6|3}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=Gala|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}

{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=Chu Kai Wang|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1995|7|29}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[S.L. Benfica de Macau|Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Leong Chon Kit (footballer, born 2005)|Leong Chon Kit]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2005|08|16}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Wing Yee FT]]|clubnat=HKG|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=Wong Kit Wai|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|08|26}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[University of Macau|Universidade de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=Leong Kun Tou|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|06|13}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=Gala|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=Danael Joseph|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|01|30}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=Lei Kam Kit|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Hang Sai]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=2|pos=DF|name=Ip Ieong|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1999|4|3}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[University of Macau|Universidade de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=[[2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship|2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship Preliminary Round]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=9|pos=DF|name=[[Ng Wa Seng]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1999|8|2}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Central & Western District R&SA|Central and Western]]|clubnat=HKG|latest=[[2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship|2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship Preliminary Round]]}}

{{Nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=Man Chak Nam|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|06|26}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[University of Macau|Universidade de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=Kou Pak San|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|03|28}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=Leong Wai Hin|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|03|25}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=Gala|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=Ao Chi Kin|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1994|2|12}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Cheng Fung]]|clubnat=Macau|<nowiki>2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship Preliminary Round]]</nowiki>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Cheong Ka Chon]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1995|10|14}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Cheng Fung]]|clubnat=Macau|<nowiki>2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship Preliminary Round]]</nowiki>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=Lei Man Tek|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2006|03|08}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[S.L. Benfica de Macau|Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|<nowiki>2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship Preliminary Round]]</nowiki>}}

{{Nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Lee Keng Pan]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1990|2|28}}|caps=13|goals=0|club=[[S.L. Benfica de Macau|Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Leong Hou In]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1997|6|15}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Benfica de Macau]]|clubnat=Macau|latest=vs Hong Kong, March 19}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Ho Ka Seng]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1993|10|21}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Gala FC|Gala]]|clubnat=Macau|<nowiki>2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship Preliminary Round]]</nowiki>}}
{{nat fs break}}

<sup>INJ</sup> Player withdrew from the squad due to an injury<br>
<sup>PRE</sup> Preliminary squad<br>
<sup>WD</sup> Player withdrew from the squad.<br>
<sup>RET</sup> Player retired from international football
{{nat fs end}}

==Records==
{{Updated|19 March 2025}}<ref name="hHQCM" />
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Macau.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Period
|-
|1
|align=left|[[Cheang Cheng Ieong]]
|58
|0
|2005–2018
|-
|2
|align=left|'''[[Ho Man Fai]]'''
|47
|0
|2011–present
|-
|3
|align=left|{{interlanguage link|Kong Cheng Hou|it|Gong Zhenghao}}
|43
|0
|2006–2019
|-
|4
|align=left|'''[[Pang Chi Hang]]'''
|36
|1
|2012–present
|-
|5
|align=left|[[Che Chi Man]]
|34
|6
|1996–2013
|-
|rowspan=2|6
|align=left|'''[[Chan Man]]'''
|33
|2
|2011–present
|-
|align=left|[[Geofredo Cheung]]
|33
|3
|2001–2011
|-
|8
|align=left|[[Lei Ka Him]]
|31
|1
|2010–2019
|-
| rowspan="3"|9
|align=left|[[Lam Ka Seng]]
|30
|6
|2014–2023
|-
|align=left|[[Lao Pak Kin]]
|30
|1
|2005–2017
|-
|align=left|'''[[Leong Ka Hang]]'''
|30
|12
|2010–present
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Period
|-
|1
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Chan Kin Seng]]
|17
|29
|{{#expr:17/29 round 2}}
|2006–2013
|-
|2
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Leong Ka Hang]]'''
|12
|30
|{{#expr:12/30 round 2}}
|2010–present
|-
|3
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Niki Torrão]]
|9
|21
|{{#expr:9/21 round 2}}
|2011–2023
|-
|rowspan=2|4
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Lam Ka Seng]]
|6
|30
|{{#expr:6/30 round 2}}
|2014–2023
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Che Chi Man]]
|6
|34
|{{#expr:6/34 round 2}}
|1996–2013
|-
|6
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Ho Man Hou]]
|5
|19
|{{#expr:5/19 round 2}}
|2006–2015
|-
|rowspan=2|7
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Carlos Leonel]]
|4
|8
|{{#expr:4/8 round 2}}
|2017–2018
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Pelé (footballer, born 1973)|Pelé]]
|4
|9
|{{#expr:4/9 round 2}}
|1996–1997
|-
|rowspan=3|9
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Filipe Duarte (footballer)|Filipe Duarte]]
|3
|13
|{{#expr:3/13 round 2}}
|2016–2023
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Chong In Leong]]
|3
|24
|{{#expr:3/24 round 2}}
|2001–2011
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Geofredo Cheung]]
|3
|33
|{{#expr:3/33 round 2}}
|2001–2011
|-
|}

==Competitive record==

===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|-
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]]
!rowspan=37|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]]
|-
!Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D*|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|F|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|A|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|F|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|A|Goals against}}
|-
| {{flagicon|Uruguay}} [[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]]
| rowspan="11" colspan="8" |''Part of {{fb|Portugal}}''
| rowspan="11" colspan="6" |''Part of {{fb|Portugal}}''
|-
| {{flagicon|Italy|1861}} [[1934 FIFA World Cup|1934]]
|-
| {{flagicon|France|1794}} [[1938 FIFA World Cup|1938]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Brazil|1889}} [[1950 FIFA World Cup|1950]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Switzerland}} [[1954 FIFA World Cup|1954]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Sweden}} [[1958 FIFA World Cup|1958]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Chile}} [[1962 FIFA World Cup|1962]]
|-
|{{flagicon|England}} [[1966 FIFA World Cup|1966]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Mexico}} [[1970 FIFA World Cup|1970]]
|-
| {{flagicon|West Germany}} [[1974 FIFA World Cup|1974]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Argentina}} [[1978 FIFA World Cup|1978]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Spain}} [[1982 FIFA World Cup|1982]]||colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not qualify''||3||0||0||3||0||9
|-
| {{flagicon|Mexico}} [[1986 FIFA World Cup|1986]]||6||2||0||4||4||15
|-
| {{flagicon|Italy}} [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]]||colspan=8|''Did not enter''||colspan=6 rowspan=1|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|United States}} [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]||colspan=8 rowspan=9|''Did not qualify''||6||0||0||6||1||46
|-
| {{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]||6||1||1||4||3||28
|-
| {{flagicon|South Korea|1997}}{{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]||6||0||0||6||2||31
|-
| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]||2||0||0||2||1||6
|-
| {{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]||2||0||0||2||2||13
|-
| {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]||2||0||0||2||1||13
|-
| {{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]||2||0||1||1||1||4
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]||2||1||0||1||1||3
|-
| {{flagicon|Canada}}{{flagicon|Mexico}}{{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
|2||0||1||1||1||5
|-
| {{flagicon|Morocco}}{{flagicon|Portugal}}{{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
| {{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!'''Total'''||–||'''{{Tooltip|0/11|Number of tournaments qualified for}}'''||–||–||–||–||–||–
!'''39'''||'''4'''||'''3'''||'''32'''||'''17'''||'''173'''
|}

===AFC Asian Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|-
!colspan=9|[[AFC Asian Cup]]
!width=1% rowspan=39|
!colspan=6|[[AFC Asian Cup qualification]]
|-
!Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D*|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
| {{flagicon|Hong Kong|1955}} [[1956 AFC Asian Cup|1956]] ||colspan=9 rowspan=6|''Did not enter''|| colspan=7 rowspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|South Korea|1949}} [[1960 AFC Asian Cup|1960]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Israel}} [[1964 AFC Asian Cup|1964]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Iran|1964}} [[1968 AFC Asian Cup|1968]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Thailand}} [[1972 AFC Asian Cup|1972]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Iran|1964}} [[1976 AFC Asian Cup|1976]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Kuwait}} [[1980 AFC Asian Cup|1980]]||colspan=8 rowspan=1|''Did not qualify''||3||1||0||2||4||7
|-
| {{flagicon|Singapore}} [[1984 AFC Asian Cup|1984]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not enter''||colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[1988 AFC Asian Cup|1988]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Japan|1870}} [[1992 AFC Asian Cup|1992]]||colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Did not qualify''||3||1||1||1||4||4 
|-
| {{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[1996 AFC Asian Cup|1996]]||3||1||0||2||7||12 
|-
| {{flagicon|Lebanon}} [[2000 AFC Asian Cup|2000]]||3||1||0||2||1||4
|-
| {{flagicon|China}} [[2004 AFC Asian Cup|2004]]||2||0||0||2||0||5
|-
| {{flagicon|Indonesia}} {{flagicon|Malaysia}} {{flagicon|Thailand}} {{flagicon|Vietnam}} [[2007 AFC Asian Cup|2007]] ||colspan=8|''Did not enter''||colspan=8| ''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2011 AFC Asian Cup|2011]]||colspan=8 rowspan=5|''Did not qualify''||colspan=8 rowspan=2| [[AFC Challenge Cup]]
|- 
| {{flagicon|Australia}} [[2015 AFC Asian Cup|2015]]
|- 
| {{flagicon|UAE}} [[2019 AFC Asian Cup|2019]]||8||0||1||7||5||20
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2023 AFC Asian Cup|2023]]||2||1||0||1||1||3
|-
| {{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2027 AFC Asian Cup|2027]]||4||0||1||3||1||9
|-
!'''Total'''||–||0/19||–||–||–||–||–||–||28||5||3||20||23||64
|}

===East Asian Cup record===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[East Asian Football Championship]] Finals
! rowspan=2|
!colspan=7|Preliminary competition
|-
!Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D*|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Place}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
! colspan="17"|East Asian Football Championship
|-
|{{flagicon|JPN}} [[2003 East Asian Football Championship|2003]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
!rowspan=4|
|3rd||4||2||0||2||5||5	
|-
|{{flagicon|KOR}} [[2005 East Asian Football Championship|2005]]||colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=7|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|CHN}} [[2008 East Asian Football Championship|2008]]||rowspan=2 colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|4th||3||0||1||2||3||14
|-
|{{flagicon|JPN}} [[2010 East Asian Football Championship|2010]]
|3rd||3||1||1||1||9||5
|-
! colspan="17"|EAFF East Asian Cup
|-
|{{flagicon|KOR}} [[2013 EAFF East Asian Cup|2013]]||rowspan=2 colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
!rowspan=2|
|2nd||2||1||0||1||5||4
|-
|{{flagicon|CHN}} [[2015 EAFF East Asian Cup|2015]]
|2nd||3||1||1||1||4||4
|-
! colspan="17"|EAFF E-1 Football Championship
|-
|{{flagicon|JPN}} [[2017 EAFF East Asian Cup|2017]]||rowspan=2 colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
!rowspan=10|
|3rd||3||1||1||1||7||6
|-
|{{flagicon|KOR}} [[2019 EAFF E-1 Football Championship|2019]]
|2nd||3||1||1||1||4||5
|-
|{{flagicon|JPN}} [[2022 EAFF E-1 Football Championship|2022]]
|colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=7|''Not held''
|-
|{{flagicon|KOR}} [[2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship|2025]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2nd||1||0||0||1||1||2
|-
!'''Total'''||–||0/9||–||–||–||–||–||–
!–||22||7||5||10||38||45
|}

=== AFC Challenge Cup record ===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[AFC Challenge Cup]] record
!rowspan=39|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Bangladesh}} [[2006 AFC Challenge Cup|2006]]||Group stage||15th||3||0||1||2||2||8
|colspan=6|''No qualification''
|-
|{{flagicon|India}} [[2008 AFC Challenge Cup|2008]]||colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|0
|2
|3
|6
|-
|{{flagicon|Sri Lanka}} [[2010 AFC Challenge Cup|2010]]
|5
|1
|0
|4
|4
|12
|-
|{{flagicon|Nepal}} [[2012 AFC Challenge Cup|2012]]
|2
|1
|0
|1
|4
|5
|-
|{{flagicon|Maldives}} [[2014 AFC Challenge Cup|2014]]
|3
|0
|0
|3
|0
|6
|-
!Total||Group stage||1/5||3||0||1||2||2||8||12||2||0||9||11|||29
|-
|}

=== AFC Solidarity Cup record ===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[AFC Solidarity Cup]]
|-
!Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|- style="background:silver;"
|{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[2016 AFC Solidarity Cup|2016]]
|'''Runners-up'''
|'''2nd'''
|'''5'''
|'''2'''
|'''2'''
|'''1'''
|'''8'''
|'''5'''
|-
|[[2020 AFC Solidarity Cup|2020]]
|colspan=8|''Cancelled''
|-
!Total
!Runners-up
!1/1
!5
!2
!2
!1
!8
!5
|-
|}

==Head-to-head record==
''As of 29 March 2026 after match against [[Tanzania national football team|Tanzania]]''

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center; font-size: 100%"
|-style="color:black;"
! style="width:145px;"|Opponents
! style="width:8px;"| First
! style="width:8px;"| Last
! style="width:1px;"| Pld
! style="width:1px;"| W
! style="width:1px;"| D
! style="width:1px;"| L
! style="width:1px;"| GF
! style="width:1px;"| GA
! style="width:1px;"| GD
!style="width:1px;" | Confederation
|-
|align=left|{{fb|ARU}}
|2026
|2026
|1
|0
|0
|1
|1
|4
|−3
|[[CONCACAF]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|AUS}}
|1970
|1970
|1
|0
|0
|1
|0
|9
|−9
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|BAN}}
|2009
|2009
|1
|0
|0
|1
|0
|3
|−3
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|BHU}}
|2023
|2023
|1
|0
|0
|1
|0
|1
|−1
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|BRU}}
|1985
|2024
|5
|3
|1
|2
|6
|6||0
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|CAM}}
|2008
|2023
|7
|1
|1
|5
|7
|18
|−11
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|CHN}}
|1978
|1999
|6
|0
|0
|6
|3
|26
|−23
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|TPE}}
|1992
|2025
|12
|1
|1
|10
|12
|38
|−26
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|GUM}}
|2003
|2018
|6
|2
|2
|2
|6
|8
|−2
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|HKG}}
|1982
|2025
|40
|2
|2
|36
|28
|123
|−95
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|IND}}
|2017
|2017
|2
|0
|0
|2
|1
|6
|−5
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|IRQ}}
|2001
|2001
|2
|0
|0
|2
|0
|13
|−13
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|JPN}}
|1980
|2000
|4
|0
|0
|4
|0
|26
|−26
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|KAZ}}
|2001
|2001
|2
|0
|0
|2
|0
|8
|−8
|[[UEFA]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|PRK}}
|1980
|2007
|3
|0
|0
|3
|1
|12
|−11
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|KOR}}
|1949
|1993
|3
|0
|0
|3
|2
|11
|−9
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|KUW}}
|1993
|1993
|2
|0
|0
|2
|1
|18
|−17
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|KGZ}}
|2013
|2017
|4
|0
|0
|4
|3
|8
|−5
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|LAO}}
|2016
|2017
|2
|2
|0
|0
|7
|2||+5
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|MAS}}
|1993
|2016
|3
|0
|1
|2
|0
|14
|−14
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|MRI}}
|2018
|2018
|1
|0
|0
|1
|0
|1
|−1
|[[Confederation of African Football|CAF]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|MGL}}
|1993
|2018
|10
|5
|2
|3
|18
|14||+4
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|MYA}}
|2009
|2023
|8
|0
|1
|7
|4
|26
|−22
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|NEP}}
|1997
|2016
|6
|1
|1
|4
|7
|16
|−9
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|NZL}}
|1975
|1975
|1
|0
|1
|0
|1
|1
|0
|[[Oceania Football Confederation|OFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|NMI}}
|2009
|2018
|5
|3
|1
|1
|16
|6||+10
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|OMA}}
|1997
|1997
|2
|0
|0
|2
|0
|6
|−6
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|PAK}}
|2003
|2013
|3
|0
|1
|2
|2
|7
|−5
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|PAN}}
|1975
|1975
|1
|1
|0
|0
|2
|1||+1
|[[CONCACAF]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|PHI}}
|1978
|2012
|5
|2
|0
|3
|7
|14
|−7
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|KSA}}
|1993
|1993
|2
|0
|0
|2
|0
|14
|−14
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|SGP}}
|2000
|2023
|4
|0
|1
|3
|2
|6
|−4
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|SOL}}
|2018
|2018
|1
|0
|0
|1
|1
|4
|−3
|[[Oceania Football Confederation|OFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|SRI}}
|2016
|2019
|3
|1
|1
|1
|2
|4
|−2
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|TJK}}
|2006
|2013
|2
|0
|0
|2
|0
|7
|−7
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|THA}}
|2007
|2007
|3
|0
|0
|3
|2
|15
|−13
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|TAN}}
|2026
|2026
|1
|0
|0
|1
|0
|6
|−6
|[[Confederation of African Football|CAF]]
|-
|align=left|{{fb|VIE}}
|2011
|2011
|2
|0
|0
|2
|1
|13
|−12
|[[Asia Football Confederation|AFC]]
|}

== Honours ==
===Continental===
* '''[[AFC Solidarity Cup]]'''
** {{Silver2}} Runners-up (1): [[2016 AFC Solidarity Cup|2016]]

===Summary===
{| class="wikitable" width=30% style="font-size:90%; text-align:center;"
|-
!Competition !!{{Gold1}} !!{{Silver2}} !!{{Bronze3}} !!Total
|-
|align=left|[[AFC Solidarity Cup]]
|0||1||0||1
|-
!Total!!0!!1!!0!!1
|}

== Notes ==
{{reflist|group=note}}

== References ==
{{reflist|1=30em|refs=
<ref name="rsssf@webarchive">{{cite web|url=https://www.rsssf.org/miscellaneous/century.html |title=Players with 100+ Caps and 30+ International Goals |author1=Mamrud, Roberto |author2=Stokkermans, Karel |publisher=RSSSF |access-date=4 February 2011 |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110628192800/http://www.rsssf.com/miscellaneous/century.html |archive-date=28 June 2011}}</ref>
<ref name="elorating@webarchive">{{cite web|url=http://www.eloratings.net/Macao.htm|title=Macao matches, ratings and points exchanged|publisher=World Football Elo Ratings: Macao|access-date=17 September 2017|archive-date=17 September 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170917011256/http://www.eloratings.net/Macao.htm|url-status=live}}</ref>
<ref name="espn@webarchive">{{cite web|url=https://www.espn.com/espn/wire?section=soccer&id=1992060|title=Macau suspended by FIFA due to political interference|date=15 February 2005|work=ESPN|access-date=21 July 2014|archive-date=8 August 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140808145057/http://sports.espn.go.com/espn/wire?section=soccer&id=1992060|url-status=live}}</ref>
<ref name="fifa@webarchive">{{cite web |url=https://www.fifa.com/aboutfifa/organisation/news/newsid=96287/index.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140717131852/http://www.fifa.com/aboutfifa/organisation/news/newsid=96287/index.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=17 July 2014|title=FIFA suspends the Macau Football Association |date=15 February 2005 |work=FIFA |access-date=21 July 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="2023myanmarfull">{{cite web |last1=澳門足球總會 Macau Football Association |title=International Friendly Squad List |quote=澳門男子成人代表隊將於6月18日(日)出發，前往中國大連足球訓練基地(中立場)與緬甸代表隊進行一場國際友誼賽，以下為比賽相關資訊及此次比賽的隊職員名單。 |url=https://www.facebook.com/photo.php?fbid=643761444463485&set=a.469305318575766&type=3 |website=facebook |access-date=17 June 2023 |archive-date=14 September 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230914175815/https://www.facebook.com/login/?next=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fphoto.php%3Ffbid%3D643761444463485%26set%3Da.469305318575766%26type%3D3 |url-status=live}}</ref>
<ref name="2023worldcupfull@facebook">{{cite web |last1=澳門足球總會 Macau Football Association |title=2026 FIFA World Cup Preliminary Joint Qualification Squad List |quote=10月9–17日國際足球日，澳門代表隊將進行2026世界盃亞洲區外圍賽預選賽第一圈主場及作客對緬甸的足球賽，職球員名單如下。|url=https://www.facebook.com/photo/?fbid=712735167566112&set=pcb.712735780899384 |website=facebook |access-date=6 October 2023}}</ref>
<ref name="2024futuro@facebook">{{cite web |last1=澳門足球總會 Macau Football Association |title=澳門代表隊於今日晚上出發，前往台灣高雄市，與台中FUTURO進行一場友誼賽。比賽時間為明天6月9日(日)下午3時30分（澳門時間）。|quote=比賽職球員名單：|url=https://www.facebook.com/permalink.php?story_fbid=pfbid0bXdWSUQdmFmcCqEAQ3b3JhRoQvCyVuUqsxvKKhp5dfYCKdbFE51BLySJBi4CWMLRl&id=100064889040061 |website=facebook |access-date=10 June 2024}}</ref>
<ref name="2024futuromatch@facebook">{{cite web |last1=澳門足球總會 Macau Football Association |title=澳門代表隊對陣台中Futuro足球隊，台中Futuro 上下半場各入一球，最終以二比零擊敗澳門。|quote=|url=https://www.facebook.com/permalink.php?story_fbid=pfbid0taJsXzPETRonGonbsm8LXpQMB5rjPdZQNqD1EBTiuGp3doF25xpSKt5RkhxPyAoTl&id=100064889040061 |website=facebook |access-date=10 June 2024}}</ref>
<ref name="worldfootballnet">{{cite web | url=https://www.worldfootball.net/teams/te13996/macao/ | title=Macao – Historical results | date=9 June 2019}}</ref>
<ref name="hHQCM">{{cite web |title=Macau |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/110/Macau.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
}}

== External links ==
*[https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/110/2023/Macau_A_M_149.html Macau team profile] at NationalFootballTeams.com
*[https://globalsportsarchive.com/team/soccer/macau/18650/ Macau – Team Info] at globalsportsarchive.com
*[https://www.soccerway.com/teams/macao/macao/1426/ Macau] at soccerway.com

{{Macau national football team}}
{{Football in Macau}}
{{EAFF teams}}
{{AFC teams}}
{{National sports teams of Macau}}

[[Category:Macau national football team| ]]
[[Category:Macau men's national football teams| ]]
[[Category:Asian national association football teams]]
